page.content:
Table 1 presents data for six metrics across three groups: Homa, BMI (Kg/m2), VO2 (l/min), %, WORK (Watt), and AT (l/min), with corresponding values for M, MEx, and EX, as well as P values for comparisons between groups. For Homa, the values are -1.98 [-2.87 to -1.08] for M, -2.21 [-3.34 to -1.08] for MEx, and 2.31 [1.60 to 3.02] for EX, with P values showing ns for M vs MEx, M vs EX, and MEx vs EX. BMI (Kg/m2) shows -1.35 [-2.27 to -0.43] for M, -1.99 [-2.24 to -1.74] for MEx, and 0.67 [-0.01 to 1.35] for EX, with P values of ns for M vs MEx and < 0.01 for both M vs EX and MEx vs EX. VO2 (l/min) indicates -0.09 [-0.15 to -0.03] for M, 0.19 [0.05 to 0.33] for MEx, and 0.26 [0.05 to 0.47] for EX, with P values of < 0.01 for M vs MEx and M vs EX, and ns for MEx vs EX. For %, the values are -4.70 [-7.31 to -2.1] for M, 8.11 [1.37 to 14.85] for MEx, and 14.42 [9.31 to 19.53] for EX, with all comparisons significant at < 0.01 except MEx vs EX, which is ns. For WORK (Watt), values are -3.72 [-9.85 to -2.41] for M, 21.85 [12.52 to 31.17] for MEx, and 10.22 [1.45 to 18.99] for EX, with P values of < 0.01 for both M vs MEx and M vs EX, and ns for MEx vs EX. Lastly, AT (l/min) values are -0.06 [-0.14 to 0.02] for M, -0.04 [-0.13 to 0.05] for MEx, and 0.18 [0.15 to 0.22] for EX, with P values of ns for M vs MEx and < 0.01 for both M vs EX and MEx vs EX. 

Table 2 details four studies concerning tumor types, MLH1, MSH2, MSH6, PMS2, MSI, BRAF V600E mutation, MLH1 promoter methylation, and germline mutation. The study by Hagen et al.

page.html:
IHC
TumorMLH1MSH2MSH6PMS2MSIBRAF V600E mutationMLH1 promoter methylationGermline mutation
Hagen et al. [11]CRC––––N/AWild-type+MSH2 mutation
Raymond et al. [12]CRC–+––MSI-HWild-type+MSH6 mutation
Rahner et al. [13]CRC–++–MSI-HN/A+MLH1 mutation
Yokoyama et al.EC–++–N/AN/A+MLH1 mutation

page.content: [11] on CRC shows results – for MLH1, MSH2, MSH6, PMS2, with MSI marked as N/A, BRAF V600E mutation as wild-type, MLH1 promoter methylation as +, and a germline mutation of MSH2. Raymond et al. [12] on CRC indicates – for MLH1, + for MSH2, – for MSH6, PMS2, with MSI classified as MSI-H, BRAF V600E mutation as wild-type, MLH1 promoter methylation as +, and a germline mutation of MSH6. Rahner et al. [13] on CRC shows results – for MLH1, + for MSH2, + for MSH6, – for PMS2, with MSI as MSI-H, BRAF V600E mutation as N/A, MLH1 promoter methylation as +, and a germline mutation of MLH1. Yokoyama et al. on EC shows results – for MLH1, + for MSH2, + for MSH6, – for PMS2, with MSI as N/A, BRAF V600E mutation as N/A, MLH1 promoter methylation as +, and a germline mutation of MLH1.
